svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="工具层类关系" id="bridge-cls"> <mxGraphModel dx="-624" dy="-222" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="820" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP_SELF" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="自研工具层（业务只依赖这一层，看不到任何 Spring AI 类型）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="720" width="850" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_SPRING" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="桥接层 + Spring AI（换框架只动这里）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="720" width="270" x="900" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C_AIT" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="<i>&lt;&lt;annotation&gt;&gt;</i>
@AiTool
—
+ name : String
+ description : String
+ requiresConfirmation : boolean
+ module : String" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="230" x="50" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C_TH" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="<i>&lt;&lt;interface&gt;&gt;</i>
ToolHandler
—
+ execute(args : Map,
 ctx : ToolContext)
 : ToolResult" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="240" x="340" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C_CTX" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="<i>&lt;&lt;record&gt;&gt;</i>
ToolContext
—
+ tenantId : String
+ userId : String
+ conversationId : String" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="220" x="640" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C_RES" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="<i>&lt;&lt;record&gt;&gt;</i>
ToolResult
—
+ ok : boolean
+ data : Map
+ errorMessage : String
—
+ success(data) : ToolResult
+ error(msg) : ToolResult" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="240" x="340" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C_REG" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="ToolRegistry
—
+ handlers : Map<String, ToolHandler>
—
+ getAllToolDefinitions() : List
+ get(name) : ToolHandler" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="230" x="50" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C_ORD" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="OrderQueryTool
（业务工具示例）
—
+ execute(args, ctx)
 : ctx.tenantId() 做租户隔离" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="240" x="340" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C_BRIDGE" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="AiToolBridgeConfig
—
+ bridge()
 : FunctionToolCallback[]" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="230" x="920" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C_FTC" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=8;" value="<i>&lt;&lt;Spring AI&gt;&gt;</i>
FunctionToolCallback
—
+ builder(name, fn)
+ description(...)
+ inputType(Map.class)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="230" x="920" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R_TH_CTX" edge="1" parent="1" source="C_TH" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C_CTX" value="入参"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R_TH_RES" edge="1" parent="1" source="C_TH" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C_RES" value="返回"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R_ORD_TH" edge="1" parent="1" source="C_ORD" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C_TH" value="implements"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="460" y="495" /> <mxPoint x="460" y="495" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R_ORD_AIT" edge="1" parent="1" source="C_ORD" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.8;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C_AIT" value="@AiTool 标注"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="165" y="595" /> <mxPoint x="165" y="200" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R_REG_TH" edge="1" parent="1" source="C_REG" style="endArrow=block;startArrow=diamondThin;startFill=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.65;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C_TH" value="收集所有 ToolHandler bean"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="320" y="565" /> <mxPoint x="320" y="160" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R_BRIDGE_REG" edge="1" parent="1" source="C_BRIDGE" style="endArrow=open;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.8;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C_REG" value="取定义"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="920" y="230" /> <mxPoint x="920" y="640" /> <mxPoint x="280" y="640" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="R_BRIDGE_FTC" edge="1" parent="1" source="C_BRIDGE" style="endArrow=block;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=10;fontColor=#134e4a;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="C_FTC" value="适配"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LEGEND" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontSize=10;fontColor=#475569;align=left;spacingLeft=8;verticalAlign=middle;" value="图例：白底蓝边 = 自研类型 / 概念；蓝填充 = 该层核心抽象；青绿色 = 桥接 + Spring AI 侧。虚线 = 依赖 / 标注关系，实线箭头 = 实现，菱形 = 聚合。换 AI 框架时只改青绿色区域。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="230" x="920" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 848px; height: 1px; padding-top: 13px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 图例：白底蓝边 = 自研类型 / 概念；蓝填充 = 该层核心抽象；青绿色 = 桥接 + Spring AI 侧。虚线 = 依赖 / 标注关系，实线箭头 = 实现，菱形 = 聚合。换 AI 框架时只改青绿色区域。
